userDefinedCodeListEntries.entryDescription: Vehicle/right shows no check-out for a completed stay (APDS Use Case C.2.2 transaction exception).
Vehicle occupies a different space than reserved/checked-in (C.2.2 transaction exception).
Space occupied with no matching check-in/session (C.2.2 space status).
Non-EV vehicle occupying an EV charging space (C.2.2 transaction exception).
Session exceeds its right's validity or maximum stay.
A device reports a fault state.
A device stopped communicating (lastCommunication exceeded threshold).
A lane is blocked (vehicle stuck, barrier obstruction).
Occupancy demand crossed a configured threshold for a place element.
A payment failed, was reversed, or requires attention.
A customer requested assistance at a lane/device intercom.
A subscription exhausted its delivery retry schedule and was marked failed (self-referential alert).
